# OSHA Compliance MCP Server

Pay-per-call API for OSHA safety regulation lookups. Uses AI-generated plain-English summaries from official eCFR text.

**Price:** $0.01 per call via x402 (Base network)
**Wallet:** 0x0b55C77eDC2592e38eBd008F82Cce694d3c49475
**Standards:** 479 (188 General Industry + 291 Construction)
**Data:** Last updated 2026-03-31. Penalty data current as of 2026-01-15.

## Endpoint

```
POST https://osha-mcp.vercel.app/api/lookup
GET https://osha-mcp.vercel.app/api/mcp  (tool discovery)
```

## Tools

### lookup_standard
Search OSHA standards by topic, keyword, hazard, or standard number.

Examples:
- "fall protection for roofing work"
- "respiratory protection in manufacturing"  
- "1926.501"
- "confined space entry requirements"
- "electrical safety in construction"

Response includes: standard_number, title, plain_summary (AI-generated), key_requirements, ppe_requirements, ecfr_url.

### get_ppe_requirements
Get required PPE for a task or hazard.

Examples:
- task: "overhead welding"
- task: "trenching 6 feet deep"
- task: "spray painting in enclosed space"

### get_penalty_info
Current OSHA penalty amounts by violation type.

Violation types: serious, other_than_serious, willful, repeat, failure_to_abate, posting_requirements, all.

Penalty amounts updated annually (last update: 2026-01-15).

### check_applicability
Determine which standards apply to an industry or task.

Examples:
- task: "scaffolding over 6 feet"
- industry: "residential construction"
- task: "forklift operation in warehouse"

### get_standard_text
Get full regulatory text by standard number.

Examples:
- standard_number: "1910.134" (respiratory protection)
- standard_number: "1926.501" (fall protection in construction)

## Coverage

- 29 CFR 1910 (General Industry): 188 standards
- 29 CFR 1926 (Construction): 291 standards
- Full text + AI summaries for all standards

## Disclaimer

This tool uses AI-generated summaries and does not constitute legal advice. Always verify requirements with official OSHA sources at osha.gov.
